subject: [PATCH v3 07/28] fsnotify: add FSNOTIFY_EVENT_RENAME data type

2026-04-28.patch_summary: This patch adds a new data type, FSNOTIFY_EVENT_RENAME, to the fsnotify system. It allows for the notification of rename events that replace existing files, providing both the moved dentry and the overwritten target inode in the event data. This enables consumers like nfsd to atomically observe the overwritten file without needing a separate delete event. The patch updates various functions to handle this new type, including fsnotify_move(), fsnotify_data_inode(), and fsnotify_data_dentry().
